name: Clove Essential Oil
description: A steam-distilled essential oil containing 70–90% eugenol, a phenylpropanoid with potent dental analgesic and antiseptic properties.
appearance: Clear to pale yellow liquid; strong, warm, spicy aroma
solubility: Slightly soluble in water; miscible with ethanol and organic solvents
chemistry: 70–90% eugenol — dental analgesic/antiseptic. Nerve signal inhibition.
